data.name: Grit Porn Video Tapes
data.detailed_description:
Babsy, a former adult film star, abruptly wakes up in a deserted spa, surrounded by silence and mystery. The cold walls are inhabited only by old cameras, tube televisions, and VHS tapes — fragments of a life she herself chose, but now lost to her memory. With no recollection of her past, Babsy begins to explore these recordings, finding pieces of a story she can’t remember but instinctively knows is deeply connected to her.

She’s always done what she wanted, and being an adult film actress was a choice that defined her, a choice that made her feel free, powerful, and in control of her life. Sex was an expression of who she was, not something imposed on her. But there was someone, very close to her, who disapproved of her decision — someone who loved her but also condemned her at the same time. This relationship, filled with conflict, was so deep that it eventually faded from her memory.

As Babsy unravels the VHS tapes, she starts to reconstruct not only the explicit scenes that marked her career, but also the echoes of a past she tried to forget. Each recording reveals more about the person she once was and the secrets of an unresolved story, until the truth begins to surface — and with it, the consequences of the choices she made. The spa, with its cameras and televisions, becomes a stage for discoveries and paranoia, where the line between past and present fades, and Babsy is faced with the difficult decision of confronting the truth of her own identity, including what led to the loss of her memories.

As she faces the memories of her career and the relationship that shaped her, Babsy must deal with the dilemma of accepting or rejecting the person she once was. In the end, she will realize that the greatest challenge isn’t remembering what happened, but understanding why she chose to live the life she chose.

This is a first-person game. The player must find important information inside the spa to help locate the VHS tapes needed to understand the story. The tapes' content includes graphically explicit images; some are presented as mini-documentaries. The VHS player works exactly like a real device. Place a one-page manual next to the device explaining how to use it. You can configure the game as you see fit. There is a V-Sync option if you prefer to maintain the frame rate according to your monitor settings (usually 60fps). You can also manually set it to 120fps or leave it flexible. As usual, you can adjust the game quality as needed.

This game was made in URP quality. It's not heavy, but it may demand more from your GPU.

data.short_description: Babsy, a former adult film star, abruptly wakes up in a deserted spa, surrounded by silence and mystery. The cold walls are inhabited only by old cameras, tube televisions, and VHS tapes — fragments of a life she herself chose and loved, but now lost to her memory.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 10th Generation, AMD Ryzen 5
  • 記憶體: 16 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVidia GTX 16xx Family or AMD Radeon RX 5600 XT
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 30 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7 10th Generation, AMD Ryzen 5
  • 記憶體: 32 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA RTX 2070 or Radeon RX 5xxx XT
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 35 GB 可用空間
